APPLEACCOUNTTRANSPARENCYD(8) System Manager's Manual APPLEACCOUNTTRANSPARENCYD(8)

NAME

appleaccounttransparencyd — Apple Account Transparency daemon

SYNOPSIS

appleaccounttransparencyd

DESCRIPTION

The appleaccounttransparencyd daemon manages Apple Account transparency event storage and serves XPC clients via the com.apple.appleaccount.transparency Mach service.

The daemon stores and retrieves transparency events for the current Apple Account user, supporting both read-only production clients and privileged utility clients. XPC clients holding the com.apple.appleaccount.transparency entitlement may call fetchUserEvents. Clients additionally holding the com.apple.appleaccount.transparency.utility entitlement may perform the full set of CRUD and lifecycle operations.

appleaccounttransparencyd is launched on-demand by launchd(8) and must not be invoked directly by users or processes; all interaction must occur through the designated XPC service name.

FILES

/System/Library/LaunchAgents/com.apple.appleaccounttransparencyd.plist
The launchd(8) property list that registers the daemon on macOS.
/System/Library/PrivateFrameworks/AppleAccountTransparency.framework/Versions/A/appleaccounttransparencyd
The daemon executable on macOS.
~/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.appleaccount.transparency/transparency.db
The SQLite database used to persist transparency events for the current user.

SEE ALSO

appleaccountd(8), launchd(8), launchd.plist(5)

March 18, 2026 macOS 26
